name: security_diamonize_logs
description: Returns recent Diamonize security event log entries for the current session. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: security_diamonize_status
description: Returns the Diamonize security scanner status and the timestamp of the last scan. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: storage_quezar_store
description: Encrypts and stores a payload in the Quezar Quantum Vault using AES-256-GCM. Returns a Vault ID for retrieval. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: storage_quezar_retrieve
description: Decrypts and retrieves a payload from the Quezar Quantum Vault by Vault ID. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: storage_quezar_delete
description: Permanently purges a record from the Quezar Quantum Vault. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: storage_quezar_list
description: Lists all encrypted sector IDs currently stored in the Quezar Quantum Vault. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: storage_quezar_status
description: Quezar telemetry: sector count, vault size, and encryption stats. To run on the user's OWN hardware, the local desktop engine must be installed first: call the engine_download_desktop tool before this one if it hasn't been installed yet.

name: media_lineage0_generate
description: 4K AI video via Amazon Nova Reel 1.1 or commercial-ready images via Nova Canvas. Polls until synthesis completes and returns a presigned download URL. If you don't yet have a Lineage.0 license, pass duration_seconds and this tool immediately returns the exact Gumroad checkout link for that length --

name: media_lineage0_status
description: Real-time status of the Lineage.0 Nova synthesis cluster and S3 vault.

name: media_lineage0_archive
description: Lists recently synthesized Lineage.0 multimedia artifacts from the AWS S3 vault.

name: billing_purchase
description: Returns a Gumroad checkout link. Maxion: $2.50/hr or $20/mo. Diamonize: $20/mo only (no hourly). Quezar: $9.99/mo only (no hourly), includes 25GB pre-compressed storage. Lineage.0: pay-per-video consumable credit — fixed-price tiers at 6s ($0.99), 12s ($1.68), 18s ($2.52), 24s ($3.36), 30s ($4.20),

name: billing_activate
description: After completing a Gumroad purchase, call this with your product_permalink and license_key to verify and activate your access. For Lineage.0, the key is consumed after one successful video generation.

name: gateway_status
description: Holistic health overview: all 20 tools, current license status, billing info, and Quezar vault statistics.

name: engine_download_desktop
description: Get a ready-to-install download of the Maxion desktop dashboard bundled with the closed-source local engine(s) your license covers, so the engine runs natively on your own CPU (not our hosted server) and you can watch your real hardware telemetry live in the dashboard. Returns a personalized downloa
